intake.user_request: Investigate and fix why 1,112 elements have headerStatus=stale due to exports_match_ast mismatch.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Single surgical line change: filter 'default' from astSet before bidirectional Set comparison in orchestrator.ts:483. Investigation complete — root cause confirmed via graph.json (1191 stale nodes) and source file inspection. No new abstractions needed.

root_cause.summary: tree-sitter AST emits 'default' as an exportedName for 'export default X' statements. The bidirectional Set comparison at orchestrator.ts:482-487 includes 'default' in astSet but @exports headers never declare 'default' — causing permanent mismatch on any file with a default export.
root_cause.confirmed_at: src/analyzer/analyzer-service.ts:359 (export default AnalyzerService) — AST yields {'AnalysisResult','AnalyzerService','default'}, header has {'AnalysisResult','AnalyzerService'}
root_cause.fix: Filter 'default' from astSet at orchestrator.ts line 483 before the bidirectional comparison

in_scope: Filter 'default' from astSet in orchestrator.ts bidirectional comparison (line 483)
Run populate-coderef to verify stale count drops below 100
Add regression test: file with 'export default X' must not produce headerStatus=stale

constraints: stale count after re-populate must drop below 100
Fix must not change the stale definition, only fix the mismatch source
